api_key.description: NASA Open API key, sent as the api_key query parameter. Never logged.

base_url.description: NASA API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: Start date (YYYY-MM-DD) filter for apod and neo_feed.

end_date.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD) filter for apod and neo_feed.

count.description: Number of random apod entries to return (apod only).

thumbs.description: Set to true to include video thumbnail URLs (apod only).

sol.description: Martian sol (day) to filter mars_photos by.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
